action.script: const items = document.querySelectorAll('div[class*="rounded-full"]'); const results = []; items.forEach((el, i) => { const style = getComputedStyle(el); const text = el.textContent?.trim().substring(0, 20); const bg = style.backgroundColor; const hasBorder = style.borderLeftWidth !== '0px'; results.push({i, text, bg, hasBorder, classes: el.className.substring(0, 80)}); }); JSON.stringify(results, null, 2);

steps.expectedEffect: The script will query all div elements with 'rounded-full' in their class, compute their styles, and return a JSON array with index, text content, background color, border info, and class names.
